headline: What's going on in today's session: S&P500 movers
summary: Let's delve into the developments on the US markets one hour before the close of the markets on Monday. Below, you'll find the top gainers and losers within the S&P500 index during today's session.

headline: Verisk Q1: Getting A Lot More Interesting
summary: Verisk reported Q1 revenue of $783M (+4% y/y), with improved margins and strong adjusted EBITDA, but top-line growth remains modest.
